ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "spec_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product specification */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, storage unit) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the batch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of quality control checks (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "quality_control_details" TEXT /* Details of quality control checks */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  "supplier_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "spec_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product specification */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "shipment_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipment (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, delivered, in transit) */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for the order */,
  "delivery_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for delivery */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., production, sales, quality control) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "spec_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product specification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revision record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the revision record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "spec_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product specification */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., FDA, CE, ISO) */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Certification number */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the certification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the compliance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)
